message:
test(wave-68): trait coverage for plan/analysis, plan/certificate, h2/frame, plan/rewrite

18 new tests covering Debug/Clone/Copy/PartialEq/Eq/Hash/Ord/Default derives
across ObligationSafety, CancelSafety, DeadlineMicros, ObligationFlow,
IndependenceResult, TraceEquivalenceHint, PlanHash, CertificateVersion,
CompactStep, FrameType, FrameHeader, PrioritySpec, SettingsFrame, Setting,
RewritePolicy, AlgebraicLaw, RewriteRule, RewriteReport.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
